creator: joneum@FreeBSD.org
text:
There is even MySQL 5.5 still in the ports with EOL 6/30/2022.

Next, MySWL 5.6 should be marked as EOL. Here I have to see when is a good date.

MySQL 5.7 is the current default version in FreeBSD. If this is now marked as EOL, it usually causes chaos. I have planned for the end of the year to start working on the new default version MySQL 8.0 - this will also be a long process.
